cause_of_action: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER

docket_entries.description: NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF APR-28-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION NOT REQUIRED. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HER NAME TO MICHELLE MELENDEZ. ADDITIONALLY, THE COURT GRANTS THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF GENDER FROM MALE TO FEMALE AND FOR ISSUANCE OF A NEW BIRTH CERTIFICATE. DECREE CHANGING NAME AND GENDER IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
DECREE CHANGING NAME AND GENDER FILED BY PETITIONER MELENDEZ, RODRIGO ARBALLO
